title: SSRF to Cloud Instance Metadata Service (Linux)
description:
Detects outbound HTTP requests to the cloud instance metadata endpoint
(169.254.169.254) from web application processes on Linux. This indicates
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) exploitation targeting OCI/AWS/GCP/Azure
IMDS to extract instance credentials or configuration.
Covers MITRE ATT&CK T1552.005 (Cloud Instance Metadata API).
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*169.254.169.254*') and ((msg like '*python*' or msg like '*python3*' or msg like '*node*' or msg like '*java*' or msg like '*ruby*' or msg like '*php*' or msg like '*httpd*' or msg like '*nginx*' or msg like '*uvicorn*' or msg like '*gunicorn*' or msg like '*curl*' or msg like '*wget*')))
falsepositives: Cloud-init metadata access during instance bootstrapping
OCI SDK calls using instance principal authentication
